seo.title: Mortgages for 1099 Borrowers | NY NJ FL PA | Green Street Capital
seo.description: Mortgage options for 1099 contractors and freelancers. Flexible documentation and Non-QM paths. NMLS #2066586.

hero.heading: Mortgages for 1099 Borrowers
hero.subheading: Financing strategies for contractors, freelancers, and independent professionals paid on 1099s.

intro.heading: 1099 Income Challenges
paragraphs: Searching for mortgages for 1099 borrowers near you in New York, New Jersey, Florida, or Pennsylvania? Green Street Capital is a licensed mortgage broker that compares multiple lenders for mortgages for 1099 borrowers and related programs — so you are not limited to one bank’s rules.

Contract work can be lucrative but harder to document than W-2 employment. We help 1099 borrowers assemble a clear story—history of contracts, deposits, and (when helpful) tax returns or bank statements.
The right program depends on how long you have been independent and how stable deposits look over time.

sidebar.heading: What Lenders Look For
sidebar.body: Continuity of income, reserves, credit, and clean deposit patterns matter as much as the 1099 forms themselves.

programs.title: Full Documentation
programs.description: When tax returns and 1099 history support conventional or government loans.

programs.title: Bank Statement
programs.description: When deposits better reflect cash flow than AGI.

programs.title: Non-QM
programs.description: Additional flexibility for unique contractor profiles.

programs.title: Refinance
programs.description: Options to refinance an existing home when eligible.

faqs.question: How many years of 1099 history do I need?
faqs.answer: Many programs prefer two years; some alternatives exist. We will map what your history supports.

faqs.question: Are mortgages for 1099 borrowers available in New York?
faqs.answer: Yes. Green Street Capital helps eligible borrowers explore mortgages for 1099 borrowers in New York (including NYC and surrounding areas) as a licensed mortgage broker. NMLS #2066586.

faqs.question: Can I get mortgages for 1099 borrowers in New Jersey or Florida?
faqs.answer: Often yes where licensed and program guidelines allow. We serve NY, NJ, FL, and PA — ask about mortgages for 1099 borrowers for your state.

faqs.question: How do I apply for mortgages for 1099 borrowers?
faqs.answer: Schedule a free consultation or choose a loan officer on our Team page. We will review income, credit, property, and program fit.

faqs.question: What credit score do I need for mortgages for 1099 borrowers?
faqs.answer: Requirements vary by lender and program. We review your full profile — credit is only one factor alongside income, reserves, and property type.

cta.heading: Apply as a 1099 borrower
cta.body: Start with a loan officer and bring recent 1099s, bank statements, and a debt list.
